products.name: The Margaux Lounge Chair
products.description: Hand-sculpted from solid walnut, generously upholstered in vegetable-tanned leather.

products.name: Éclat Side Table
products.description: Sculptural side table in solid brass and Carrara marble.

products.name: Sereno Pendant
products.description: Hand-blown smoked-glass pendant with brass canopy.

products.name: Porto Armchair
products.description: Solid oak frame, woven cane back, bouclé seat cushion.

products.name: Monolith Console
products.description: Sculpted travertine console with brushed-bronze base.

products.name: Colline Sofa
products.description: Low-slung, modular sofa with solid ashwood legs and a hand-stitched linen slipcover. Available in three configurations.

products.name: Calla Dining Table
products.description: Solid smoked-oak dining table with a subtly curved monolithic top and tapered legs. Seats up to eight.

products.name: Arco Floor Lamp
products.description: Sweeping arc floor lamp in patinated bronze with a mouth-blown alabaster shade. Dimmable.

products.name: Volta Vase
products.description: Wheel-thrown stoneware vase with a poured-ash glaze. No two are identical.

products.name: Petra Sculpture
products.description: Hand-carved black granite abstract sculpture. A meditation on mass and negative space.

products.name: Dune Throw
products.description: Hand-loomed from pure Mongolian cashmere. Generous 200 × 140 cm proportion.

products.name: Silence Rug
products.description: Hand-knotted from New Zealand wool with a subtle geometric weave. 300 knots per square inch.

products.name: Arc Sideboard
products.description: Four-door sideboard in solid smoked oak with integrated brushed-brass pulls. Felt-lined interior drawers.

products.name: Forma Bookshelf
products.description: Asymmetric open shelving unit in powder-coated steel with hand-sanded oak shelves. Modular by design.

products.name: LH Scandicly
products.description: MATERIALSInner FrameA precisely engineered structural core combining solid wood multilayer board and solid larch, designed to ensure long-term stability, durability, and refined structural integrity.Seat FillingA multi-layer comfort system composed of premium high-resilience foam, feather foam, memory foam, and premium white goose down, delivering a balanced combination of support, softness, and adaptive seating comfort.Backrest FillingA refined cushioning composition of premium white goose down, memory foam, and feather foam, designed to provide soft ergonomic support and a naturally relaxed seating experience.Hardware / BaseTransparent brown aluminium alloy legs paired with aluminium plate curved panels. Saddle leather curved armrests remain intentionally exposed (non-fabric covered), highlighting material authenticity, while the base frame is finished with genuine leather edging for a continuous premium material expression.Note: full leather construction is applied. The curved panel armrests are executed in saddle leather and are not fabric-covered. The base frame features genuine leather edging as a standard detail.DIMENSIONS• Width: 300 cm• Depth: 105 cm• Height: 66 cmAssembly
